services.title: Services
services.subtitle: I provide comprehensive web development solutions tailored to your needs, from building modern user interfaces to designing robust backend systems.

frontend.title: Frontend Development
frontend.description: Building responsive, pixel-perfect UIs using Angular with smooth animations and full cross-browser compatibility.

backend.title: Backend Development
backend.description: Designing scalable REST APIs using Spring Boot with clean architecture and end-to-end testing.

database.title: Database Design
database.description: Structuring efficient relational databases like PostgreSQL & MySQL and also NoSQL like MongoDB, Neo4j, with optimized queries and indexing strategies.

fullstack.title: Full Stack Web Apps
fullstack.description: End-to-end development from UI to server — delivering complete, production-ready web applications built to scale.

cleancode.title: Clean Code & Architecture
cleancode.description: Writing maintainable, SOLID-principled code with proper separation of concerns, meaningful naming, and thorough documentation.

about.subtitle: Full Stack Developer — Clean Code & Scalable Architecture
about.bio:
Full Stack Developer & Engineering graduate from Polytech Lyon, building fast, scalable, and modern web applications with a focus on clean architecture and real-world performance.

I work across the stack with Angular, React, and Spring Boot, turning ideas into production-ready systems — from responsive UIs to secure, well-structured backend APIs. I don't just build features; I design systems that are maintainable, scalable, and engineered to last.

My engineering background shapes how I think: structured, analytical, and detail-driven. Every project is an exercise in precision — writing code that is not only functional, but intentional.

Currently sharpening my backend expertise through focused Spring Boot training, pushing deeper into enterprise-grade development, API design, and backend architecture.
